dialog.title: Invite to trip
dialog.description: Share a link so others can join this trip.

expiry.label: Link expires
expiry.hint: Leave empty for a link that never expires.

dialog.errorGeneric: Failed to create the invite link.

accept.emailRestricted: This invite is limited to specific email addresses. Sign in with an invited account to join.
accept.signInPrompt: Sign in or create an account to join {{trip}}.
accept.heading: Join {{trip}}
accept.roleEditor: You will join as an editor.
accept.roleViewer: You will join as a viewer.
accept.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this trip.
